description_long: This object is a stylized handgun with a smooth, dark wooden finish throughout its body, giving it a classic and somewhat vintage appearance. The grip is gently contoured and seamlessly integrated into the frame, lacking any visible texturing or embellishments, which suggests a minimalist design. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement, and the trigger itself is simple and unadorned. The barrel is short and flush with the frame, with no visible external features such as threading, ports, or compensators. There are no visible markings, engravings, or manufacturer logos on the slide or frame, contributing to its clean and unbranded look. The magazine base is subtly rounded and blends smoothly with the grip, without any flaring, finger rests, or distinctive design elements.
description: A smooth, dark wooden handgun with a minimalist, vintage-inspired design and no visible markings or embellishments. The grip and magazine base are seamlessly integrated, and the trigger guard is rounded and simple.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the wooden handgun, highlighting the smooth grip, rounded trigger guard, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded muzzle and the symmetrical, tapered shape of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the same smooth contours and minimalist features visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded magazine base and the gentle taper of the grip, with no visible seams or embellishments.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured with a gentle curve that fits naturally in the hand, featuring a uniform dark wooden texture without any checkering, stippling, or visible ergonomic finger grooves. The surface is polished and unadorned, lacking logos or embellishments, and the transition between the grip and the rest of the frame is seamless, emphasizing a minimalist and classic design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, forming a smooth arc around the trigger area. It lacks undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories, and there is no visible texturing or reinforcement, giving it a simple and traditional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the frame, with a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, compensators, or fluting, and the finish matches the rest of the wooden body, with no external markings or features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or frame. The surface is completely smooth and unbranded, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is subtly rounded and blends seamlessly with the grip, lacking any flaring, finger rests, logos, or texturing. Its design is minimalist and does not feature any visually distinctive elements.
